_meta.description: WS1.3 stale threat-intel-feed alert. Fires when refresh_intel.sh has not recorded a successful (status=ok) heartbeat in threat-intel-meta within the window — i.e. the cron refresh died or every feed fetch is failing. Refresh cadence is 6h; window is 8h to tolerate one missed run.

logging.text: STALE THREAT-INTEL FEED: no successful refresh_intel.sh run (status=ok) in threat-intel-meta within the last 8h. Detections are running on a stale indicator set — check the cron job / feed source (abuse.ch).
